name: angular-bridge-poc
description: Angular Elements PoC — Shadow DOM + CustomEvent bridge to SFCC

scripts.deploy:s3: aws s3 sync dist/acme-bridge-poc/browser/ s3://${CDN_BUCKET}/bridge-poc/${npm_package_version}/ --cache-control 'public,max-age=31536000,immutable' --exclude 'asset-manifest.json' && aws s3 cp dist/acme-bridge-poc/browser/asset-manifest.json s3://${CDN_BUCKET}/bridge-poc/${npm_package_version}/asset-manifest.json --cache-control 'no-cache'
